scope.note: Codex-only durable identity override prep; no provider-backed commands used.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same global agency identity. The alias uses the ampersand form 'MTA Bridges & Tunnels' and the target uses 'MTA Bridges and Tunnels'; both are agency records for MTA Bridges and Tunnels.

Same global agency identity. The alias display/acronym identify MTA Bridges and Tunnels while its expanded legal entity name is Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority, the same MTA Bridges and Tunnels/TBTA identity already represented by the target.
Same global agency identity. The alias is the Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority record with acronym evidence 'MTA B&T', matching the MTA Bridges and Tunnels agency target.
Same global agency identity. The alias is Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority with acronym TBTA; the target is the same MTA Bridges and Tunnels agency identity under its current/common name.
Same global agency identity. The alias expands TBTA as Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority and carries broad TBTA evidence; the target represents the same MTA Bridges and Tunnels agency identity.
Exact same committee identity. Both records are entity records named 'MTA Audit Committee' with committee entity type; the target has broader recurring committee evidence.
Exact same department identity. Both records are entity records named 'MTA Procurement Department' with department entity type; the alias is a one-source meeting-doc duplicate of the broader target.

Exact same police department identity. Both records are named 'MTA Police Department', have police department type, and carry MTAPD acronym evidence; the target aggregates substantially broader source evidence.

Same joint railroad committee identity. Both records expand to 'Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad Committee' with committee entity type; display-name differences are only abbreviation style.

alias.display_name: Joint LIRR and Metro-North Railroad Committee
alias.entity_name: Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad Committee

target.entity_name: Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad Committee

proposed_aliases.reason: Exact same joint railroad committee identity. Both records are named 'Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committee' with committee entity type; the target has broader repeated committee evidence.

alias.display_name: Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committee
alias.entity_name: Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committee

target.display_name: Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committee
target.entity_name: Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committee

candidate_discovery.exact_duplicate_name_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select lower(trim(coalesce(e.entity_name,e.name,r.display_name))) as name_key, count(*) n, group_concat(r.record_id, ' | ') ids, group_concat(coalesce(e.entity_type,''), ' | ') types from records r join entities e on e.record_id=r.record_id left join identity_aliases ia on ia.kind='entity' and ia.alias=r.record_id where r.record_kind='entity' and ia.alias is null and coalesce(e.entity_name,e.name,r.display_name,'') != '' group by lower(trim(coalesce(e.entity_name,e.name,r.display_name))) having n > 1 order by n desc, name_key limit 120;"
candidate_discovery.normalized_duplicate_name_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select lower(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(trim(coalesce(e.entity_name,e.name,r.display_name)),'.',''),',',''),'&','and'),'  ',' '),'nyc','new york city'),'dept','department')) as norm_key, count(*) n, group_concat(r.record_id, ' | ') ids, group_concat(coalesce(e.entity_name,e.name,r.display_name), ' | ') names, group_concat(coalesce(e.entity_type,''), ' | ') types from records r join entities e on e.record_id=r.record_id left join identity_aliases ia on ia.kind='entity' and ia.alias=r.record_id where r.record_kind='entity' and ia.alias is null and coalesce(e.entity_name,e.name,r.display_name,'') != '' group by norm_key having n > 1 order by n desc, norm_key limit 160;"
candidate_discovery.result_summary: Selected entity-only candidates from exact or punctuation/abbreviation-normalized duplicate clusters. Skipped ambiguous same-label community board records spanning boroughs and skipped person/agency affiliation cases.

record_existence_and_kind.detail_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select r.record_id, r.record_kind, r.display_name, coalesce(e.entity_name,e.name,'') as entity_name, coalesce(e.entity_type,'') as entity_type, coalesce(e.acronym,'') as acronym, r.primary_source_id from records r join entities e on e.record_id=r.record_id where r.record_id in ('entity_mta-bt-biennial-bridge-2023','entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels','entity_mta-bt-meeting-doc-131666','entity_meeting-doc-171381-tbt','entity_mta-tbta','entity_meeting-doc-tbta','entity_audit-committee-charter','entity_mta-audit-committee','entity_meeting-doc-201726-procurement-dept','entity_mta-procurement-department','entity_mtapd-meeting-doc-205666','entity_annual-report-2021-mtapd','entity_joint-lirr-metronorth-committee','entity_joint-lirr-mnr-committee','entity_joint-lirr-mnr-committee-108051','entity_joint-lirr-mnrr-committee-170831') order by r.record_id;"
record_existence_and_kind.result_summary: 16/16 alias and target records exist as record_kind='entity'. Names, entity_type, acronym, and primary_source_id matched the validator evidence in proposed_aliases.

existing_alias_conflicts.merges_json_command: ids='entity_mta-bt-biennial-bridge-2023 entity_mta-bt-meeting-doc-131666 entity_meeting-doc-171381-tbt entity_mta-tbta entity_meeting-doc-tbta entity_mta-audit-committee entity_meeting-doc-201726-procurement-dept entity_mtapd-meeting-doc-205666 entity_joint-lirr-mnr-committee entity_joint-lirr-mnrr-committee-170831 entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels entity_audit-committee-charter entity_mta-procurement-department entity_annual-report-2021-mtapd entity_joint-lirr-metronorth-committee entity_joint-lirr-mnr-committee-108051'; for id in $ids; do printf '%s\t' "$id"; jq -r --arg id "$id" '(.aliases.entity[$id] // "NO_MERGE_ALIAS")' data/identity-overrides/merges.json; done
existing_alias_conflicts.merges_json_result: All 16 selected alias and target ids returned NO_MERGE_ALIAS.
existing_alias_conflicts.identity_aliases_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select kind, alias, target from identity_aliases where kind='entity' and alias in ('entity_mta-bt-biennial-bridge-2023','entity_mta-bt-meeting-doc-131666','entity_meeting-doc-171381-tbt','entity_mta-tbta','entity_meeting-doc-tbta','entity_mta-audit-committee','entity_meeting-doc-201726-procurement-dept','entity_mtapd-meeting-doc-205666','entity_joint-lirr-mnr-committee','entity_joint-lirr-mnrr-committee-170831','entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels','entity_audit-committee-charter','entity_mta-procurement-department','entity_annual-report-2021-mtapd','entity_joint-lirr-metronorth-committee','entity_joint-lirr-mnr-committee-108051');"
existing_alias_conflicts.identity_aliases_result: no output; none of the selected alias or target ids are already canonical identity aliases

do_not_merge_conflicts.db_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "with pairs(kind,alias,target) as (values ('entity','entity_mta-bt-biennial-bridge-2023','entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels'),('entity','entity_mta-bt-meeting-doc-131666','entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels'),('entity','entity_meeting-doc-171381-tbt','entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels'),('entity','entity_mta-tbta','entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels'),('entity','entity_meeting-doc-tbta','entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels'),('entity','entity_mta-audit-committee','entity_audit-committee-charter'),('entity','entity_meeting-doc-201726-procurement-dept','entity_mta-procurement-department'),('entity','entity_mtapd-meeting-doc-205666','entity_annual-report-2021-mtapd'),('entity','entity_joint-lirr-mnr-committee','entity_joint-lirr-metronorth-committee'),('entity','entity_joint-lirr-mnrr-committee-170831','entity_joint-lirr-mnr-committee-108051')) select d.* from do_not_merge d join pairs p on d.kind=p.kind and ((d.record_id_a=p.alias and d.record_id_b=p.target) or (d.record_id_a=p.target and d.record_id_b=p.alias));"
do_not_merge_conflicts.db_result: no output; no selected pair is present in canonical do_not_merge
do_not_merge_conflicts.json_command: jq -r '.pairs.entity[]? | select((.record_ids|index("entity_mta-bt-biennial-bridge-2023") and index("entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels")) or (.record_ids|index("entity_mta-bt-meeting-doc-131666") and index("entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels")) or (.record_ids|index("entity_meeting-doc-171381-tbt") and index("entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels")) or (.record_ids|index("entity_mta-tbta") and index("entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels")) or (.record_ids|index("entity_meeting-doc-tbta") and index("entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels")) or (.record_ids|index("entity_mta-audit-committee") and index("entity_audit-committee-charter")) or (.record_ids|index("entity_meeting-doc-201726-procurement-dept") and index("entity_mta-procurement-department")) or (.record_ids|index("entity_mtapd-meeting-doc-205666") and index("entity_annual-report-2021-mtapd")) or (.record_ids|index("entity_joint-lirr-mnr-committee") and index("entity_joint-lirr-metronorth-committee")) or (.record_ids|index("entity_joint-lirr-mnrr-committee-170831") and index("entity_joint-lirr-mnr-committee-108051"))) | .record_ids | @tsv' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
do_not_merge_conflicts.json_result: no output; no selected pair is present in data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json

prior_prep_conflicts_through_identity114.command: for f in data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch0*-prep.json data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch10[0-9]-prep.json data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch11[0-4]-prep.json; do jq -r --arg f "$f" '.proposed_aliases[]? | select(.kind=="entity") | select(.alias_id as $a | ["entity_mta-bt-biennial-bridge-2023","entity_mta-bt-meeting-doc-131666","entity_meeting-doc-171381-tbt","entity_mta-tbta","entity_meeting-doc-tbta","entity_mta-audit-committee","entity_meeting-doc-201726-procurement-dept","entity_mtapd-meeting-doc-205666","entity_joint-lirr-mnr-committee","entity_joint-lirr-mnrr-committee-170831"] | index($a)) | [$f,.alias_id,.target_id] | @tsv' "$f" 2>/dev/null; done
prior_prep_conflicts_through_identity114.result: no output; none of the proposed aliases appear in prior codex identity prep artifacts through batch114

source_evidence_spot_check.result_summary: Spot checks confirm same-name or abbreviation-equivalent entity records with compatible entity types and source evidence for all 10 proposed aliases.

forbidden_command_compliance.result: No external/provider-backed commands or profiles/providers were used. No canonicalize, canonicalize-wave, canonicalize-review, campaign dedup, identity-review-run, write, ask, schema-propose, ontology-normalize-run, materialize, export-jsonl, or validate commands were run. Inspection used local deterministic commands only: pwd, rg, ls, sed, head, tail, jq, sqlite3, git status, and date. The only file write was this prep artifact.
